servinfo.title: CPP No.2 Switch Inspection and Adjustment

ptxt.intxrefpoff: CPP No.2 Switch Removal and Installation

servinfosub.title: Inspection
servinfosub.ptxt: Check for resistance between terminals under each condition below. If check result is not satisfactory, replace switch.

spec.title: CPP No.2 switch specification
spec.ptxt: When switch shaft is pushed [a]: No continuity
When switch shaft is free [b]: Continuity exists

servinfosub.title: Adjustment
servinfosub.ptxt: With clutch pedal (1) pulled toward driver’s seat, adjust switch (2) position so that clearance “a” between end of thread and clutch pedal arm is within specification. Then tighten lock nut to specified torque.

spec.title: Clearance between end of thread and clutch pedal arm
